name: shamir-e2e
description: End-to-end test harness for ShamirDB — uses the shamir-client native binding to drive a real server subprocess through the full TLS+SCRAM+Batch flow.

scripts.build:binding: cd ../../crates/shamir-client-node && npm install && npx napi build --platform --release
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:binding
